params.body:
Hi {{vars.email_sender}},

 

Your Onboarding request was processed. The new employee was provisioned correctly. Please, find below the provisioning details.

 

Field Status
Employee Provisioned {{vars.employee_name}} - {{vars.employee_email}} - {{vars.employee_position}}
Employee Username used on AD and Linux {{vars.employee_id}}
MAC address identified in the original email {{vars.employee_mac}}
Systems Provisioned 

{% if vars.ad_provisioning == 1 %}
  AD - OK
{% endif %}

{% if vars.fgt_provisioning == 1 %}
  FGT - OK
{% endif %}

{% if vars.linux_provisioning == 1 %}
  Linux - OK
{% endif %}

Date: {{ arrow.utcnow().format('YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss.ssss')}}Z

 

Count on FortiSOAR and IT teams for next Onboardings.

Best Regards,

{{vars.input.records[0].emailTo}}
params.subject: Reply - {{vars.input.records[0].emailSubject}}

{% if vars.BPonline_status == 'ONLINE' %} {{vars.onlineDescription}} {% elif vars.BPonline_status == 'OFFLINE' %} {{vars.offlineDescription}} {% elif vars.BPonline_status == 'NON_FUNCTIONAL' %} {{vars.nonFunctionalDescription}} {% elif vars.BPonline_status == 'TAKEDOWN' %} {{vars.takedownDescription}} {% else %} UNKOWN_STATUS {% endif %}
Tag Description
{% for tag in vars.BPtags %} {% if tag.name == 'Brand Impersonation' %} {{vars.impersonationDescription}}
{% elif tag.name == 'Typosquatting' %} {{vars.typoDescription}}
{% elif tag.name == 'MX Record' %} {{vars.mxDescription}}
{% elif tag.name == 'Phishing' %} {{vars.phishingDescription}}
{% elif tag.name == 'Parked Domain' %} {{vars.parkedDescription}}
{% else %} UNKOWN_TAG
{% endif %} {% endfor %}

arguments.mxDescription: 'An MX (Mail eXchanger) DNS record is a type of resource record in the Domain Name System (DNS) that specifies the mail servers responsible for receiving email on behalf of a domain. It tells sending servers where to route messages (via SMTP). Without correct MX records, emails will not reach their intended destination'
arguments.typoDescription: 'Typosquatting tag: a typosquatting domain alert is a cybersecurity warning about a malicious or suspicious domain name that mimics a legitimate one using small spelling mistakes or variations (e.g., goggle.com instead of google.com)'
arguments.onlineDescription: 'Online Status: this denotes that the website has an active web server'
arguments.parkedDescription: 'Parked tag: this denotes that the domain is not hosting any website. But rather is hosting webpage with advertisements'
arguments.offlineDescription: 'Offline Status: this denotes that the website does not have an IP address in the DNS A type records'
arguments.phishingDescription: 'Phishing tag: a phishing domain alert is a cybersecurity warning that a domain is being used (or likely to be used) to trick users into revealing sensitive information, such as passwords, credit card details, or credentials'
arguments.takedownDescription: 'A Takedown was requested for the problematic Domain. Go to the Original JSON to see the ticket_id'
arguments.impersonationDescription: 'Brand Impersonation tag: a brand impersonation domain alert is a cybersecurity warning that a domain is pretending to represent a legitimate company or brand (e.g., using the brand name in the domain to look official)'
arguments.nonFunctionalDescription: 'Non Functional Status: this denotes that the website, in spite of having an IP address in the DNS A type records, is not hosting a web server'
